hero.liveStatus: 182 stores are processing orders with PickEat today
hero.title: Orders, Operations, Reports
hero.description: PickEat consolidates all your store's order channels into one, providing the metrics your operations team needs to make quick decisions. Experience an intuitive board instead of complex spreadsheets.
hero.statsOrders: orders processed via PickEat last week

aiRecommendation.title: AI Order Recommendations
aiRecommendation.description: Recommend the most satisfying menu by combining team preferences and weather data.

smartSync.title: Smart Order Sync
smartSync.description: Order status is synchronized in real-time so stores and customers share the same information.

paymentAutomation.title: Payment & Accounting Automation
paymentAutomation.description: Integrate multiple revenue channels to generate reports that your accounting team can use immediately.

workflow.title: Operations Completed in Three Steps
workflow.description: We kept only the screens you need, from onboarding to reporting. Designed to help teams make quick decisions at every stage.

step1.title: Menu Onboarding
step1.description: Load menus and options in minutes via CSV or POS integration.

step2.title: Order Integration
step2.description: Bring delivery app, kiosk, and in-store orders together on the PickEat board.

step3.title: Operations Insights
step3.description: Check average check size, revisit rate, and popular menu trends right on your dashboard.

cta.title: Activate your operations dashboard in 2 weeks, regardless of team size.
cta.description: We conduct 1:1 configuration reviews with a solution architect and support up to 2 pilot stores for free.
